local_effect: Increased friction, vibration, heat in main shaft
system_effect: Turbine forced offline; risk of cascading drivetrain damage; among the most expensive repairs

failure_cause: Motor/electrical wear, encoder drift, control card fault
local_effect: Loss of precise blade angle control
system_effect: Reduced power regulation; in worst sub-modes, loss of the primary overspeed protection layer
Torque transfer degraded/lost; turbine stopped; one of the costliest drivetrain repairs
Loss of generation at that turbine; major component replacement

failure_cause: Pump fault, accumulator fault, low fluid level
system_effect: Degraded pitch or brake actuation — a shared support system for two safety-critical functions

local_effect: Reduced heat rejection, rising component temperature
system_effect: Typically a controlled derate/trip on over-temperature protection rather than a catastrophic event — moderate severity by design of the protection scheme
score_source: Added by aeolus_rams — not in Section 1.6 source table; re-review before treating as final

failure_cause: Worn/damaged grounding brush, degraded lightning conduction path
local_effect: Increased risk of induced electrical/mechanical damage during a lightning strike
system_effect: Often no IMMEDIATE operational disruption — the real risk is latent: it raises the probability/severity of a FUTURE lightning-induced failure elsewhere (blade, electronics). Scored above 'moderate' to reflect that latent risk even though it rarely triggers a standalone SCADA event.
score_source: Added by aeolus_rams — not in Section 1.6 source table; re-review before treating as final

system_effect: Loss of a redundant overspeed protection layer — safety-relevant

local_effect: Internal electrical fault, pressure relief activation
system_effect: Loss of power export from that turbine; fire/containment risk

local_effect: Safety interlock opens, or fails to protect
system_effect: Fail-safe shutdown, or reduced electrical fault protection
Turbine derated or stopped; production loss until module replaced
Loss of monitoring visibility; concurrent with another fault, removes the automated trip's ability to act
Reduced energy capture, increased loading; rarely safety-critical alone
